final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original 3×3 character expression grid illustration featuring 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传 as the central IP theme.

Style/medium: needs a "3D animation" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Pixar feature film character rendering, Disney 3D short film visual language, Nintendo Switch 3D RPG cutscene art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid of 9 panels (3 rows × 3 columns), each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 — young woman with long dark flowing hair, delicate classical Chinese features, adapted into 3D animated style — across all 9 panels with the following expressions, actions, and outfits:
  Top-left: winking / adjusting glasses / green sweater
  Top-center: smirking / lowering dark sunglasses / red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking / finger on chin / yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile / arms resting on edge / black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling / thumbs up / orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral / drinking boba tea / blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy / waving / purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed / arms crossed / pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly / poking cheeks / teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel must feature a torn hole in white paper as the framing device, character peeking through
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, playful, expressive mood — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied palette across panels reflecting each outfit color — exact tonal balance is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished 3D render surface quality — exact texture detail is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve 赵灵儿 character identity consistently across all 9 panels; all 9 panels must be visible and clearly separated in the grid
Avoid: flat 2D illustration; inconsistent character appearance across panels
